exercises.title: C: Key Word Transformation
exercises.instructions: Complete each second sentence using the word given, so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence. Write between two and five words.
exercises.studentInstruction: Complete each second sentence using the word given, so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence. Write between two and five words.

items.sentence:
I'm sure Sophie didn't take your notebook. **can't**
Sophie ...... your notebook.
items.explanation: Impossible → Sophie **can't have taken** your notebook.

items.sentence:
They will punish you for cheating in the exam. **away**
You won't ...... cheating in the exam.
items.explanation: Avoid punishment → won't **get away with** cheating.

items.sentence:
Liam broke my camera, but I've forgiven him. **for**
I've forgiven ...... my camera.
items.explanation: Forgive for → forgiven **Liam for breaking** my camera.

items.sentence:
The police said that the man had stolen the painting. **accused**
The police ...... the painting.
items.explanation: Accuse of → **accused the man of stealing** the painting.

items.sentence: The police will ...... the thief if they find him.
